en: Material storage must prevent falling, slipping, tipping, or rolling hazards.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 15(1)
Storage must be limited to a height that ensures stability. Only lightweight materials may be stacked manually higher than 2.00 m.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 15(3)
Storage Height Limits (No More Than 2 Meters)
Stack foundations must be firm, level, and strong.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 15(4)
Packaging condition must be verified before transporting packaged materials.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 16(3)
Drop zones must be secured before dropping materials. Drop authorization signals must confirm the area is secure.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 16(5)
